name: ecom-platform-root
description: Orchestration root for Creator Desk microservices

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix product-service && npm install --prefix cart-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix product-service" "npm run dev --prefix cart-service" "npm run dev --prefix order-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
